/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcutlass_gemm_sm80_dgemm.so -o libcutlass_gemm_sm80_dgemm.so CMakeFiles/cutlass_library_gemm_sm80_dgemm_objs.dir/generated/gemm/80/dgemm/all_sm80_dgemm_gemm_operations.cu.o CMakeFiles/cutlass_library_gemm_sm80_dgemm_objs.dir/generated/gemm/80/dgemm/cutlass_simt_dgemm_128x128_8x3_nn_align1.cu.o CMakeFiles/cutlass_library_gemm_sm80_dgemm_objs.dir/generated/gemm/80/dgemm/cutlass_simt_dgemm_128x128_8x3_nt_align1.cu.o CMakeFiles/cutlass_library_gemm_sm80_dgemm_objs.dir/generated/gemm/80/dgemm/cutlass_simt_dgemm_128x128_8x3_tn_align1.cu.o CMakeFiles/cutlass_library_gemm_sm80_dgemm_objs.dir/generated/gemm/80/dgemm/cutlass_simt_dgemm_128x128_8x3_tt_align1.cu.o  -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN' -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN/../lib64' -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN/../lib' -Wl,-rpath,'/usr/local/cuda/lib64' -Wl,-rpath,'/usr/local/cuda/lib' -ldl /usr/local/cuda/lib64/stubs/libcuda.so -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN' -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN/../lib64' -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN/../lib' -Wl,-rpath,'/usr/local/cuda/lib64' -Wl,-rpath,'/usr/local/cuda/lib' -ldl -lcudadevrt -lcudart  -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
